sections.heading: (1) This Act may be cited as the Supreme Court of Zambia Short title
sections.text:
(1) This Act may be cited as the Supreme Court of Zambia Short title
(Amendment) Act, 2002, and shall be read as one with the Supreme Cap. 25
Court of Zambia Act, in this Act referred to as the principal Act.

sections.heading: The principal Act is amended in section eight, by— Amendment
sections.text:
The principal Act is amended in section eight, by— Amendment
of section 8
(a) the deletion of the full stop at the end of paragraph (ii) and
the substitution therefor of a comma; and
(b) the iiir.ertion at the end of paragraph (ii) of the following
words:
" except that the Civil Court Practice 1999 (The
Green Book) of England or any other civil court practice
rules issued after 1999 in England shall not apply to
Zambia unless they relate to matrimonial causes ".
Single copies of this Act may be obtained from the Government Printer,
P.O. Box30136,10101 Lusaka. Price K500 each
